km.Kenn, Devon, England: កេន, ដិវ៉ុន, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: 當Dewnes Waltham於1548年2月22日出生在英國戴文肯恩時，她的父親Sir Knight Richard Waltham38歲，母親Lady Alice Pangborne34歲。她於1576年6月25日與Hughe Rychardes在英國戴文肯恩結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dewnes Waltham于1548年2月22日出生在英国戴文肯恩时，她的父亲Sir Knight Richard Waltham38岁，母亲Lady Alice Pangborne34岁。她于1576年6月25日与Hughe Rychardes在英国戴文肯恩结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Waltham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Waltham (Lincs, Essex, Leics) or any of the numerous other places so named.

variants.name: Whatham
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Wattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Whattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

nameMeanings.name: Dewnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German Dienes , a short form of the Greek name Dionysius.
English: variant of Dean , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Dienes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Sandor, Zol, Zoltan.
German: from a vernacular form of the personal name Dionysius (see Dennis ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Dewnes Waltham was born on 22 February 1548, in Kenn, Devon, England, her father, Sir Knight Richard Waltham, was 38 and her mother, Lady Alice Pangborne, was 34. She married Hughe Rychardes on 25 June 1576, in Kenn, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dewnes Waltham est née le 22 février 1548, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Knight Richard Waltham, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Pangborne, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Hughe Rychardes le 25 juin 1576, à Kenn, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dewnes Waltham am 22. Februar 1548 in Kenn, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Knight Richard Waltham 38 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Pangborne 34. Sie hat am 25. Juni 1576 in Kenn, Devon, England Hughe Rychardes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dewnes Waltham è nata il il 22 febbraio 1548 nel Kenn, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Knight Richard Waltham, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Pangborne, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Hughe Rychardes il 25 giugno 1576, nel Kenn, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Dewnes Walthamが1548年2月22日にイギリスデボンケンで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Richard Walthamは38歳，母Lady Alice Pangborneは34歳であった。1576年6月25日にイギリスデボンケンでHughe Rychardesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Dewnes Waltham(이)가 1548년 2월 22일 영국 데폰 켄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight Richard Waltham(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Pangborne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1576년 6월 25일 영국 데폰 켄에서 Hughe Rychardes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dewnes Waltham nasceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1548, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Knight Richard Waltham, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Pangborne, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Hughe Rychardes em 25 de junho de 1576, em Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dewnes Waltham родилась 22 февраля 1548 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Knight Richard Waltham было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Pangborne, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hughe Rychardes 25 июня 1576 г. в местности кенн, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dewnes Waltham nació el 22 de febrero de 1548, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Knight Richard Waltham, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Pangborne, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Hughe Rychardes el 25 de junio de 1576, en Kenn, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
